global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent offer and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting travel booking services with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main visual element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears to be a placeholder for an image or illustration.

elements.label: Secondary visual element
elements.description: A smaller circular graphic element positioned centrally, likely representing another image or icon.

elements.description: A rectangular graphic element that could represent a placeholder for an image or content.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, prominent text stating 'Book your next trip' with a subtext about hotels and flights.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: The logo of WayPoint, displayed at the top in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' positioned at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text.
